message:
fix(security): cap KDF iterations, fix rate limiter TOCTOU race, prevent blast-radius overflow

KDF iteration DoS guard (encryption.rs):
- Add MAX_KDF_ITERS (10M) cap during bundle decryption header parsing.
  A crafted bundle could previously specify an astronomically high
  iteration count to cause CPU-bound denial of service.

Rate limiter double-check fix (enforcer.rs):
- Remove redundant first call to check_with_override() that was discarded.
  Previously the rate limiter was called twice per check — once to "test"
  and once to "use" — creating a TOCTOU race window where two concurrent
  checks could both pass the test phase.

Blast radius overflow guard (robot_constraints.rs):
- Change fetch_add to fetch_update with saturating_add on the accumulated
  blast bytes counter, preventing u64 wrapping that could reset the
  counter to near-zero and bypass blast radius limits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
